# Traxis Ecosystem Constellation

## Project Status

**23 active** | 2 complete | 1 retired

- [+] **P1: ProShop Automations** -- Fusion 360 add-in connecting to ProShop ERP via GraphQL API for work order browsing.
- [+] **P2: YCM Post Processor Development** -- Custom Fusion 360 post processor for YCM NTC1600LY CNC lathe.
- [+] **P3: Customer Portal** -- Customer portal integrating Softr, Airtable, ProShop ERP, and Dropbox for order management.
- [+] **P4: Inspection Print and ProShop Automation** -- AI-powered PDF balloon dimension extraction tool with ProShop ERP integration.
- [?] **P5: Hyundai Post Processor Development** -- Research BLE proximity detection system for CNC machine shop worker tracking.
- [+] **P6: Chevalier Post Processor Development** -- Fusion 360 post processor for Chevalier EM2040L vertical milling center.
- [+] **P7: Customer Outreach** -- Reduce customer concentration risk through targeted local business outreach.
- [~] **P8: Catastrophe Planning** -- Strategic risk planning for manufacturing business continuity and resilience.
- [+] **P9: Shop Floor Cameras** -- Desktop kiosk for shop floor operators to capture GoPro photos and upload to ProShop work orders.
- [-] **P10: Conversational ProShop** -- Natural language interface for ProShop ERP work order queries.
- [~] **P11: ProShop Mobile App** -- Native iOS app for querying ProShop ERP from the shop floor.
- [+] **P12: FASData Implementation** -- FOCAS connectivity test for FANUC CNC machines at Traxis Manufacturing.
- [=] **P13: Preventive Maintenance** -- Battery backup labels for CNC drives. Minimal scope -- just label files.
- [+] **P14: Workstation Display (IPC)** -- Chrome extension for shop floor IPC measurement entry integrated with ProShop work orders.
- [?] **P15: ProShop Replacement Research** -- Research and architectural planning for ProShop ERP replacement system.
- [=] **P16: Fusion Tool Library Product ID Changer** -- Fusion 360 add-in to audit and fix Product IDs in tool libraries for ProShop ERP integration.
- [+] **P17: COTS Crib Kiosk** -- Touch-screen kiosk for COTS tool crib inventory checkout via ProShop API.
- [~] **P18: ProShop Message Notifier** -- Sends notifications for messages in a shopping application.
- [+] **P19: Shop Scheduler** -- Daily job readiness scheduler surfacing machine openings, job readiness status, and bottleneck diagnostics.
- [+] **P20: Traxis Data** -- Analyzes ProShop ERP data to identify why a CNC machine shop loses money despite high utilization.
- [+] **P21: Haas Communication Investigation** -- Raspberry Pi Zero bridge for Haas CNC USB program transfer and serial monitoring.
- [+] **P22: Tool Assembly Management** -- Tool kiosk system with ProShop inventory sync and label printing.
- [+] **P23: Air Compressor Communication** -- Web GUI for monitoring and controlling EMAX air compressor via Modbus TCP.
- [+] **P24: Digital Help For Rene** -- Automate Rene Maldonado's ProShop workload at Traxis Manufacturing.
- [+] **P25: Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)** -- Always-running data quality agent auditing ProShop ERP and machine monitoring.
- [+] **P27: Accounting Ingest** -- Accounting data ingestion system for processing financial records.

## Interface Map

| Project | Produces | Consumes |
|---------|----------|----------|
| P1: ProShop Automations | Overseer dashboard (port 8060), /api/status, /api/services/*/restart\|stop\|start, /api/programming-sessions, overseer.log | Health endpoints from 12 managed services (ports 5000-8101), FOCAS monitoring.db, P25 TelegramBot (:8100), P25 AgentScheduler (:8101) |
| P9: Shop Floor Cameras | WO label PNGs (saved to labels/), QR labels printed via P22 print service | ProShop GraphQL API (work orders, operations, parts), .traxis.env, P22 print_service /api/print-image (10.1.1.242:5002), GoPro WiFi API (10.5.5.9) |
| P19: Shop Scheduler | scheduler.db (SQLite), Flask web UI (port 5080), /api/priorities/report endpoint, /api/tool-demand endpoint, heartbeat.json (Overseer health check) | ProShop GraphQL API (WOs/ops/machines/tools/toolpots/purchaseOrders), P22 tooling.db (read-only via config.KIOSK_DB_PATH), Overseer (managed service), .traxis.env (PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET) |
| P22: Tool Assembly Management | tooling.db (SQLite at tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db), Flask kiosk UI (port 5001), /api/print-label proxy, /api/print-inventory-label proxy, /api/print-image (generic PNG label printing), /api/restart (remote restart), /api/health endpoint, heartbeat.json (Overseer health check) | ProShop GraphQL API (tools/RTAs/work cells/pockets/users/work orders), .traxis.env (TOOLKIOSK_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/SCOPE), Overseer (managed service), FocasMonitor monitoring.db (read-only), Brother PT-P700 printer (USB on 10.1.1.242) |
| P25: Agent Exploration | audit.db, reports/latest.md, project_index.json, service_heartbeat.json, Telegram bot, /api/health on ports 8100+8101 | ProShop GraphQL API, FOCAS monitoring.db, NC Programs filesystem, Anthropic API, Telegram Bot API, Overseer (managed service) |

## Critical Seams

Cross-project contracts -- breaking these silently breaks a downstream project.

- **P19 (Shop Scheduler):** P19 reads P22 tooling.db read-only at ../22. Tool Assembly Management/tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db -- path set in config.py:35. Schema: tool_inventory table (tool_number, tool_description, qty_blue, qty_green, min_quantity, last_counted_at)
- **P22 (Tool Assembly Management):** P19 reads tooling.db read-only at ../22. Tool Assembly Management/tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db -- path must not change without updating P19 config.py:35
- **P22 (Tool Assembly Management):** print_service runs on port 5002 on 10.1.1.242 -- P9 and kiosk app consume /api/print-image with {image_base64, copies, label_name}
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** WO labels are 128px tall, 180 DPI -- must match PT-P700 printable area
- **P25 (Agent Exploration):** Overseer manages TelegramBot (port 8100) and AgentScheduler (port 8101) via AGENT_DIR path. Health endpoints must return JSON with `"status": "ok"`. service_wrapper.py only launches Overseer; all P25 services managed through Overseer.
